favo: Try to build some CRIT Rate if using this weapon to trigger the passive consistently
cr-favo: Only recommended if using a **Favonius** weapon
wip-artifact: Viable Artifact Set with WIP Calculations:
4vv-p45: Anemo characters can be extremely good at buffing **Pyro/Electro/Cryo/Hydro** with this artifact set. It is recommended to spend minimal resin to give your anemo support a cheap 4pc set (regardless of the stats) if it helps your team.
4scroll-p45: Natlan supports can easily buff **Pyro/Electro/Cryo/Hydro** with this artifact set. Getting a cheap 4pc set regardless of stats would be beneficial if it helps your team.
